vocab.simpleZh: 没有证据但先相信的想法。
vocab.exampleEn: The article challenges the assumption that technology always saves time.
vocab.exampleZh: 文章挑战了技术总能节省时间这个假设。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use challenge the assumption that... for reading and Task 2 ideas.
vocab.upgradeZh: challenge the assumption that... 适合阅读理解和大作文。

cycle.summaryEn: Use short sets to build speed, focus, and calm under pressure.
cycle.summaryZh: 用短小测练速度、专注和压力下的稳定性。

frame.useEn: Use to explain why something happens.

meaningEn: This reading word helps Becky understand questions and paraphrases faster.
meaningZh: 这个阅读词可以帮助 Becky 更快看懂题目和改写。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "assumption" using This happens because...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "assumption" 和 这是因为... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
